content:
let v01 = c010[c] * (1.0 - fb) + c011[c] * fb;
        let v10 = c100[c] * (1.0 - fb) + c101[c] * fb;
        let v11 = c110[c] * (1.0 - fb) + c111[c] * fb;
        let v0 = v00 * (1.0 - fg) + v01 * fg;
        let v1 = v10 * (1.0 - fg) + v11 * fg;
        out[c] = v0 * (1.0 - fr) + v1 * fr;
    }
    out
}
```
